channel.title: ICL Journal
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in ICL Journal

item.title: In Memoriam Theo Öhlinger (1939–2023)
item.description: Article by Mujib Jimoh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icl-2025-0005

item.title: The Transformation of China: Constitutional Review in Action
item.description: Article by Mujib Jimoh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icl-2025-0003

item.title: Situating Hong Kong’s ‘Rule of Law’ Internationally
item.description: Article by Mujib Jimoh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icl-2024-0015

item.title: The Role of the Constitution in Sweden: Addressing its Patchy Legal Legitimacy and the (Half-Way) Transition from Political to Legal Constitutionalism
item.description: Article by Mujib Jimoh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icl-2024-0023

item.title: The Emergence of Constitutionally Conforming Interpretation
item.description: Article by Mujib Jimoh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icl-2024-0031

item.title: Conditional Right to Child Education in Nigeria: Punishing the Child for the Parents’ Sins
item.description: Article by Mujib Jimoh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/icl-2024-0017
